title: tanacetum abrotanifolium
intro: Tanacetum abrotanifolium, also known as southernwood, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain, and combat infections. The health benefits of southernwood include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Southernwood can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for internal use, and it is also used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to address skin issues and wounds.
